name: XEYYEX 2: Colour Wars
short_description: The space-eyed couple is back! This time they will use the ability to change color to fight. An arcade genre game that pays tribute to the first titles of the 80s. 1 or 2 players.
detailed_description:
The space-eyed couple is back! This time they will use the ability to change color to fight color wars. The galaxy is immersed in a great conflict and enemies of various colors and attacks circulate freely. Be skillful when directing your gaze and making the right choice of color. An arcade genre game that pays tribute to the first titles of the 80s. 1 or 2 players.

* 15 Stages.
* 15 achievements.
* 15 enemies with different behavior (up to 5 colors).
* Possibility of making color combinations to beat your scores.
* 1 or 2 players.
* Xbox controller or keyboard.
* An ideal game for achievement hunters and score breakers.
